messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0063",
  "title": "关键变化",
  "page_index": 42,
  "page_range": "42-43"
}

Section text:
关键变化
据Business ofApps 数据显示 ，在iOS与Google Play平台上 ，超过95%的移动
游戏安装用户会在 30天内流失 ³。
在如此规模化的用户流失背景下 ，2026 年将成为可持续增长的关键拐点 。
真正的可持续增长 ，要求以留存为核心驱动的全链路协同机制 ——在这一机制中 ，用
户获取 、互动与再营销不再各自为战 ，而是作为一个统一的学习系统协同运作 。“留存正在成为新的效果指标，
而效果，正在成为新的品牌。 ”
Rajeev Ranjan,
Aarki 产品副总裁
1. Beat the 4 Bosses Holding Back Your App’s Growth, Aarki 2025. | 2. Forecast number of mobile users worldwide from 2020 to 2025, Statista | 3. Mobile game churn rates (2025), Business of Apps, 2025
42

message.content:
This section addresses mobile app growth challenges and strategic marketing shifts. It can answer retrieval questions regarding:
• **Metrics & Churn Data:** What is the current mobile game user churn rate? (>95% of iOS and Google Play mobile game installs churn within 30 days, per Business of Apps 2025 data).
• **Key Dates & Projections:** When is the critical turning point for sustainable app growth projected to occur? (2026).
• **Definitions & Strategic Frameworks:** What defines true sustainable growth in mobile marketing? (A retention-driven, full-funnel collaborative mechanism where user acquisition, engagement, and remarketing operate as a unified learning system rather than isolated channels).
• **Claims & Industry Trends:** How are performance and brand metrics evolving? (Retention is becoming the new performance metric, and performance marketing is becoming the new brand, as stated by Rajeev Ranjan, VP of Product at Aarki).
• **Entities & Evidence Types:** Which organizations and data sources support these insights? (Business of Apps, Aarki, Statista; evidence includes 2025 industry reports, global mobile user forecasts, churn rate datasets, and executive commentary).
The section contains no tables or figures but provides specific quantitative metrics, strategic definitions, and cited industry reports for factual retrieval.

     - Context of large-scale churn: 2026 will be a key turning point for sustainable growth.
     - True sustainable growth requires a retention-driven, full-funnel collaborative mechanism.
     - User acquisition, engagement, and remarketing should work as a unified learning system, not in silos.
     - Quote: "Retention is becoming the new performance metric, and performance is becoming the new brand." - Rajeev Ranjan, VP of Product at Aarki.
     - Footnotes/References: 1. Beat the 4 Bosses Holding Back Your App’s Growth, Aarki 2025. | 2. Forecast number of mobile users worldwide from 2020 to 2025, Statista | 3. Mobile game churn rates (2025), Business of Apps, 2025

   - *Dates:* 2025 (report/data year), 2026 (projected turning point for sustainable growth), 30 days (churn timeframe).

   - *Metrics:* >95% churn rate within 30 days for mobile games on iOS/Google Play.

response_text:
This section addresses mobile app growth challenges and strategic marketing shifts. It can answer retrieval questions regarding:
• **Metrics & Churn Data:** What is the current mobile game user churn rate? (>95% of iOS and Google Play mobile game installs churn within 30 days, per Business of Apps 2025 data).
• **Key Dates & Projections:** When is the critical turning point for sustainable app growth projected to occur? (2026).
• **Definitions & Strategic Frameworks:** What defines true sustainable growth in mobile marketing? (A retention-driven, full-funnel collaborative mechanism where user acquisition, engagement, and remarketing operate as a unified learning system rather than isolated channels).
• **Claims & Industry Trends:** How are performance and brand metrics evolving? (Retention is becoming the new performance metric, and performance marketing is becoming the new brand, as stated by Rajeev Ranjan, VP of Product at Aarki).
• **Entities & Evidence Types:** Which organizations and data sources support these insights? (Business of Apps, Aarki, Statista; evidence includes 2025 industry reports, global mobile user forecasts, churn rate datasets, and executive commentary).
The section contains no tables or figures but provides specific quantitative metrics, strategic definitions, and cited industry reports for factual retrieval.
